summary: Completed testing of Code Red Initiatives v5 - Pipeline Update. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new features verified via Playwright - Navigation renamed to 'Code Red Pipeline', Add Project modal with business outcome alignment checkboxes, KPI trend charts with recharts working.

design_issues.issue: HTML validation warning: <span> cannot be a child of <tbody>. This is a React hydration warning that shows in console but doesn't affect functionality.

passed_tests: Login with demo@vertiv.com/Demo2024! - SUCCESS
Navigation shows 'Code Red Pipeline' (renamed from Executive Dashboard) - SUCCESS
Navigation shows 'Business Outcomes' - SUCCESS
Page title shows 'CODE RED PIPELINE' - SUCCESS
Pipeline shows 4 columns (Not Started, Discovery, Frame, Work In Progress) - SUCCESS
Expanding initiative shows 'Add Project' button - SUCCESS
Add Project modal opens with all fields (Name, Description, Owner, Status) - SUCCESS
Add Project modal shows 'Align to Business Outcomes' section with checkboxes - SUCCESS
Business outcome checkboxes show ETO, Quality, PDSL categories - SUCCESS
Can create a new project under an initiative - SUCCESS
Project created toast shown after create - SUCCESS
New project visible in pipeline after creation - SUCCESS
Business Outcomes page shows categories (ETO, Quality, PDSL) with progress - SUCCESS
Clicking chart icon on KPI opens trend modal - SUCCESS
Trend modal shows line chart with historical data (recharts) - SUCCESS
Trend modal shows Baseline, Current, Target values - SUCCESS
Trend modal shows historical data table (Date, Value) - SUCCESS
Backend: Dashboard stats API returns all required fields - SUCCESS
Backend: Pipeline API returns 4 status columns - SUCCESS
Backend: Projects have business_outcome_ids field - SUCCESS
Backend: KPI history endpoint returns historical data - SUCCESS
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: BusinessOutcomes.jsx line 739-741: HTML validation warning about span being a child of tbody. Recommend wrapping map() output in a React Fragment instead of span for better HTML validity.
seed_data_creation: Seed endpoint creates: 3 categories (ETO, Quality, PDSL), 7 sub-outcomes, 11 KPIs with weekly history data, 5 strategic initiatives, 4 projects with milestones
context_for_next_testing_agent: Code Red Pipeline update verified. Changes: 1) Navigation renamed from 'Executive Dashboard' to 'Code Red Pipeline'. 2) Add Project modal now has 'Align to Business Outcomes' section with checkboxes for ETO, Quality, PDSL categories. 3) Projects have business_outcome_ids field stored in backend. 4) KPI trend charts working with recharts library showing line visualization with historical data. All features working correctly.

kpi_trend_modal.trigger: Chart icon button on KPI card
kpi_trend_modal.title: KPI Trend: {kpi_name}

project_crud_from_pipeline.edit: Not fully tested (edit button visible on hover)
project_crud_from_pipeline.delete: Not fully tested (delete button visible on hover)
